# CodeHTML — Premium Custom Software & Web Development Studio

> CodeHTML is a Dubai-based digital engineering studio founded in 2024. We specialize in custom React websites, SaaS platforms, web applications, and iOS/Android mobile apps. We serve clients in UAE, India, Singapore, UK, and USA.

## Services
- Custom Website Development (from $200 / ₹15,000)
- Web Application Development (CRM, ERP, dashboards)
- SaaS Platform Development (multi-tenant, subscriptions)
- Mobile App Development (React Native, iOS, Android)
- AI & Automation (WhatsApp bots, workflow automation)
- SEO & Digital Growth (AEO, local SEO, conversion optimization)

## Key Facts
- 118+ completed platforms
- 99+ Lighthouse performance scores
- 3-5 day rapid delivery for MVPs
- 100% code ownership, zero licensing fees
- Dubai office: Business Bay
- Contact: +91 93032 28082, Contact@Codehtml.in

## Projects
- Alaya Realty (alayarealty.in) — Real estate portal, 0.7s load time
- Swigato India (swigatoindia.in) — Multi-city food platform
- SLCC (slcc.in) — Construction portal with 3D blueprints
- Crysta Media (crystamedia.in) — Corporate events agency site
- Elgamingo (elgamingo.store) — Gaming e-commerce store

## Pricing
- Startup Website: $200 / ₹15,000
- Growth System: $1,100 / ₹85,000
- Enterprise Protocol: $3,000 / ₹2,50,000
